assertions.message: A verification incident without incoming change triage must remain not_applicable.
The response must classify the evidence and timing methods before changing product behavior.
Verification retries must be bounded and preceded by failure classification.
A changed validator must still reject the preserved known-bad case and accept a known-good case.
Failed evidence attempts must remain visible rather than being overwritten by a later pass.
Focused repair evidence must not replace the required final ordered gate.
